items.name: Mega OPA! Platter
items.description: Your choice of two tender souvlaki skewers, grilled to perfection and served with rice, an oven-roasted potato, your choice of Greek, Caesar, or Santorini salad, pita wedges, and our famous OPA! tzatziki.
items.simplified_description: A large platter with two grilled souvlaki skewers, rice, potato, salad, pita, and tzatziki.

items.name: OPA! Platter
items.description: Your choice of tender souvlaki skewer grilled to perfection, served with rice, oven-roasted potato, Greek, Caesar or Santorini salad, pita wedges and our famous OPA! tzatziki.
items.simplified_description: A platter with one grilled souvlaki skewer, rice, potato, salad, pita, and tzatziki.

items.name: Souvlaki & Salad
items.description: Choose one of our tender souvlaki skewers alongside your choice of salad and seasoned pita wedges ready to dip in our famous OPA! tzatziki.
items.simplified_description: A souvlaki skewer with a salad and seasoned pita for dipping in tzatziki.

items.name: OPA! Fries
items.description: Our crispy, golden fries tossed in herbs and lemon juice, served with our famous OPA! tzatziki.
items.simplified_description: Crispy fries with herbs and lemon, served with tzatziki.

items.name: Calamari
items.description: Crispy fried calamari piled high, battered in our own special seasoning, topped with red onions and served with our famous OPA! tzatziki.
items.simplified_description: Fried calamari with seasoning and red onions, served with tzatziki.

items.name: Pita Wraps
items.description: Tender souvlaki or gyro wrapped in a warm pita, drizzled in our famous OPA! tzatziki and topped with your choice of onions, tomatoes, lettuce, fresh jalapeno peppers and feta cheese.
items.simplified_description: Souvlaki or gyro in a warm pita with tzatziki and your choice of toppings.

items.name: Falafel Snack Bites
items.description: Freshly ground chickpeas blended with Mediterranean spices, lightly fried until crispy, served with our famous OPA! tzatziki. Five snack bites per order.
items.simplified_description: Crispy falafel bites made from chickpeas, served with tzatziki.

items.name: Tzatziki & Pita
items.description: Our soft, chewy pita wedges fresh off the grill, perfect for dipping in our famous OPA! tzatziki.
items.simplified_description: Warm pita wedges for dipping in tzatziki.

items.name: Hummus & Pita
items.description: Our soft, chewy pita wedges fresh off the grill and ready to be dipped in our signature hummus.
items.simplified_description: Warm pita wedges for dipping in hummus.

items.name: Baklava
items.description: Our thin, flaky dessert pastry filled with crushed almonds, walnuts and honey.
items.simplified_description: A sweet pastry with nuts and honey.

items.name: Calamari & Salad
items.description: Crispy fried calamari piled high, battered in our own special seasoning, topped with red onions and served with your choice of salad and our famous OPA! tzatziki.
items.simplified_description: Fried calamari with seasoning and red onions, served with a salad and tzatziki.

items.name: Kids Meal
items.description: Tender chicken souvlaki served with rice, a half order of pita wedges, our famous OPA! tzatziki and a juice box or fountain drink.
items.simplified_description: A kids meal with chicken souvlaki, rice, pita, tzatziki, and a drink.

items.name: Caesar Salad
items.description: Crisp romaine lettuce tossed in a creamy Caesar dressing and topped with croutons, Parmesan cheese and optional bacon bits.
items.simplified_description: A salad with romaine, Caesar dressing, croutons, and Parmesan.

items.name: Greek Salad
items.description: Vine-ripened tomatoes, cucumbers, sweet peppers and red onions tossed in our own Greek dressing and topped with crumbled feta cheese and Kalamata olives.
items.simplified_description: A salad with tomatoes, cucumbers, peppers, onions, feta, and olives.

items.name: Santorini Salad
items.description: Our Santorini Salad is a plant-based, dairy free, fresh and delicious meal option for vegetarians and vegans! This salad features chick peas, tomatoes, red onions, dill and capers tossed in our signature Greek dressing.
items.simplified_description: A plant-based salad with chickpeas, tomatoes, onions, dill, and capers.

items.name: Side Skewer
items.description: Add an extra skewer of our tender souvlaki, grilled to perfection.

items.name: Spanakopita
items.description: Flaky phyllo pastry filled with a blend of spinach, feta and fresh herbs, served with our famous OPA! tzatziki.
items.simplified_description: A pastry with spinach and feta, served with tzatziki.

items.name: Rice Pilaf
items.description: Our delicious, fluffy rice goes great with everything.
items.simplified_description: Fluffy rice that pairs well with any dish.
